name: Go Quirk!
short_description: A collectathon, memory card game where your aim is to collect as many quirky characters as possible! Then Steal, Block and Stop your way to victory with this quirky twist on the traditional card game of Go Fish.
detailed_description:
Experience the delightful, mischievous digital card game, in single-player, that will have you cheering with joy, getting your own back and collecting lots of cute quirky characters. Go Quirk! is a digital card game where you collect your favourite characters, then block, steal and stop your way to victory. Based on the traditional card game rules of Go Fish, with a new and exciting twist.

There's lots going on in a game of Go Quirk!, you'll be memorising where characters are and who's exchanged cards, strategizing your gameplay with action cards and making smart decisions on which cards to play and when! This is your route to winning a game and celebrating with the most Quirks.

But it doesn't stop there! All the Quirks you've collected get added to your sticker book for your selected deck. This is where you can set goals and change the way you play the game; seeking out specific Quirks to complete your sticker collection. Once all 13 characters have been unlocked for your deck, you'll unlock the next deck and experience 13 new characters. There are 4 decks to complete. Can you collect them all?

Collect the same character more than once? No problem. Now's your chance to make them bronze, silver and gold in your sticker book!

Part collectathon, part memory game, all card game.

Each game takes roughly 5 minutes to play.

The app is based on the real physical card game Quirk! by Gibsons.
